userMessage: Set CH1 200mV DC 50ohm VDD_CORE, CH2 500mV DC 50ohm VDD_IO, CH3 1V DC 50ohm VDD_PHY, CH4 2V DC 1Mohm PGOOD signal. Set trigger on CH4 rising edge 1V normal mode. Single sequence acquisition record length 10 million samples. Add measurements: delay from CH4 rising to CH1 crossing 100mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH2 crossing 250mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH3 crossing 500mV. Add pk2pk and mean on CH1 CH2 CH3. Query all delay and measurement results saving to named variables. Save all 4 channels as binary files. Take screenshot.

errors: Prose exceeded 400 characters and was truncated.

response.text:
I can only build directly applyable Steps JSON with verified SCPI. Based on this turn, I do have verified commands for single-sequence acquisition and trigger edge slope, plus your preloaded verified label command, but I do **not** have verified SCPI yet for:

- analog channel scale / coupling / termination on CH1-CH4
- trigger source / trigger level / trigger mode normal
- record length
- creatin...

ACQuire:SEQuence:MODe NUMACQs; ACQuire:SEQuence:NUMSEQuence 1"}},{"id":"s5","type":"write","label":"Set trigger slope rising","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:EDGE:SLOpe RISe"}},{"id":"s7","type":"write","label":"Arm acquisition","params":{"command":"ACQuire:STATE RUN"}}]},{"id":"g_auto_4","type":"group","label":"Save Results","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"s8","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH1 waveform","params":{"source":"CH1","filename":"ch1.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"s9","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH2 waveform","params":{"source":"CH2","filename":"ch2.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"s10","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH3 waveform","params":{"source":"CH3","filename":"ch3.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"s11","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH4 waveform","params":{"source":"CH4","filename":"ch4.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"s12","type":"save_screenshot","label":"Save screenshot","params":{"filename":"power_sequence_capture.png","scopeType":"modern","method":"pc_transfer"}}]},{"id":"s13","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect scope","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}
